response.title: Senior Policy Analyst
response.description: The Department of National Affairs is seeking a Senior Policy Analyst who will be responsible for conducting comprehensive policy analysis and providing strategic recommendations to enhance government initiatives. The ideal candidate will leverage their expertise in public policy to influence decision-making and implement effective solutions to complex issues facing the government.

required_skills: Extensive knowledge of federal policy-making processes and regulations
Strong quantitative analysis skills, including proficiency in statistical software (e.g., SPSS, R)
Expertise in qualitative research methodologies and evaluation techniques
Ability to draft high-quality reports and policy briefs
Demonstrated experience in stakeholder engagement and public consultation processes
Proficient in data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)
Capacity to develop and conduct workshops and presentations for diverse audiences
Strong project management skills with a proven track record of leading cross-functional teams
preferred_skills: Experience with grant writing and funding proposal development
Knowledge of international policy frameworks and best practices
Familiarity with legislative processes and advocacy strategies
requirements.education: Master's degree in Public Policy, Political Science, or related field
